content: Is it possible to link to a user profile on Zulip?
A quick search suggests not, but everyone in the zulip must have an email address, so you can always refer people by that?
You can also find me on LinkedIn by my name, but it's easier to give you an URL

At https://rust-for-linux.zulipchat.com/#organization/profile-field-settings admins can add custom profile fields which users can set. On the rust zulip this is for example your gender and github account. But a link is also a valid type for a custom field.
